text.title: Offline Data Sync with IndexedDB and Background Sync
text.summary: Queue failed requests in IndexedDB, replay on reconnect via Background Sync API. Critical: IDB transactions auto-close on non-IDB awaits — never mix IDB and fetch operations in one transaction.

rule.statement: Never await a non-IDB promise inside an open IndexedDB transaction. The transaction auto-commits (and becomes unusable) after the first non-IDB await.
rule.rationale: This is the single most common IndexedDB bug generated by LLMs; the symptom is "transaction has finished" errors that only appear under load or with real network latency.

rule.statement: Register one-shot Background Sync via registration.sync.register(tag). Do not confuse with PeriodicSyncManager — Background Sync fires once when network is restored; Periodic Sync repeats on a schedule and requires an installed PWA.
rule.rationale: Agents routinely swap SyncManager and PeriodicSyncManager; Background Sync has no guaranteed timing and requires Chrome or Edge.
